measured.transcript: Today is Wednesday, May the third, two thousand six. The time is approximately eight thirty three PM The location is twenty eight eleven West Main Street, Casper, Wyoming. My name is Greg Irwin, video specialist of Legal Video of Wyoming, located at three fifty Katie Lane, Casper, Wyoming. This is case number five nine eight dash six three six nine filed in the district court in Toronto County, Wyoming, Eighth Judicial District, The deponent is Paul Fraser. The video deposition is requested by John Spencer, Attorney for the Defense. court reporter is Dorothy Bunn of Dor of Bunn and Counsel and all present will please identify themselves for the record. John Spencer representing the Max Mutual Insurance Company. Do you mind if your witness does not stand to be sworn? No, I do not. do you solemnly swear from the testimony
